特記事項: 【合併】英語IIｄ　１９（経済学部）/英語IVｂ　１９（経済学部）
授業方法: Class will be face to face style. In this class, students will practice using the target language through a variety of lessons and activities.  Pair and group work will be an integral part of each class.  Situational pair work dialog construction and presentation will also be a fundamental part of the course.後期から教科書が「English Please」に変更となります。

第1回: 【Startup Week】      【Flex Hours】     "Online class（On-demand format）"    　　《30 minutes》　　　　Orientation, rules and regulations, class format, short self introductions
Short essay:  Summer holiday, 45 minutes of study
第2回: 【Core Weeks 1】     "Face-to-face class"     　　《90 minutes》  　　　　　summer holiday interview chart, short presentations on holiday time
Writing: Opinions on short presentations. 45 minutes of study.
第3回: 【Core Weeks 2】      "Face-to-face class"          　《90 minutes》    Text: Collecting Data - pair work activity, making inquiries and note taking
Summary of the collecting date in-class exercise. One hour of out of class study.
第4回: 【Core Weeks 3】     "Face-to-face class"     　　　《90 minutes》　　　　　　pair work gap information activity, listening comprehension drills, vocabulary matching
Grammar worksheet homework assignment. One hour of study.
第5回: 【Core Weeks 4】      "Face-to-face class"     　　《90 minutes》　　　　　　situational dialog pair work construction: ordering dinner in a restaurant and presentation
More dialog construction, order dinner scenarios. One hour of study.
第6回: 【Core Weeks 5】      "Face-to-face class"     　　《90 minutes》　　　　　situational dialog pair work construction: buying train tickets and presentation
Essay: travel pitfalls and correcting them. One hour of out of class study.
第7回: 【Flex Hours】      "Online class（On-demand format）"     　　《90 minutes》        Interview a foreign exchange student, questions to be provided
Writing of interview dialog, one hour of study
第8回: 【Core Weeks 6】     "Face-to-face class"      　　《90 minutes》　　            pair work information gap exercise, small group interview chart, listening comprehension exercises
Review in-class interview chart and listening drills. One hour of study.
第9回: {【Core Weeks 7】     "Face-to-face class"     　　　《90 minutes》　　　　　reading: new article and comprehension, expressing opinions, supporting thoughts
Begin presentation preparation. One hour of out of class study.
第10回: 【Core Weeks 8】      "Face-to-face class"      　　《90 minutes》　　　　　　What is one reason why ...? pair work activity, situational dialog construction and presentation: class schedule
Reflection worksheet on presentations. 45 minutes of study.
第11回: 【Core Weeks 9】      "Face-to-face class"     　　《90 minutes》　　　　　　　pair work information gap exercise, listening comprehension drills, find the word that does not belong activity
Building vocabulary, worksheet assignment. One hour of out of class study.
第13回: 【Core Weeks 10】          "Face-to-face class"    　　《90 minutes》                   　　  Cultural and geographical questions, group interview chart, making probable predictions
Report: countries to be announced. One hour or more of study.
第14回: 【Flex Hours】      "Online class（On-demand format）"     　　《90 minutes》        Interview a foreign exchange student, questions to be provided
More feedback on the in-class article. One hour of study.  Study for exam.
第15回: 【Core Weeks 11】    "Face-to-face class"      《90 minutes》　　　　　　　"If the world were 1000 people" article and opinions presented, exam explanation and practice
第16回: 【Core Weeks 12】       "Face-to-face class"      　　《90 minutes》　　　【Classes and examinations period】
トピック.授業外学習2: Students would be advised to do as much personal study outside the classroom as possible.  Also, to submit any homework assignments on time.

学位授与の方針との関連Relationship to Diploma Polic:
各授業科目は、各学部・研究科の定めるディプロマ・ポリシー（DP）・カリキュラム・ポリシー（CP）に基づき、カリキュラム上に配置されています。
DP・CPを意識して本授業科目の学修を進めることで、各学部・研究科の期待する能力が養成されます。
各学部・研究科のDP、CPや教育課程表（授業科目一覧等）は、下記リンクこちらに掲載していますので学修計画の参考にしてください。
